# netbox_device_role (Resource)

Manages a Device Role in Netbox.



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `color` (String) Color for the device role as a 6-digit hex string (e.g. "aa1409").
- `name` (String) Name of the device role.

### Optional

- `custom_fields` (Map of String) Custom field values as a map of field name to string value.
- `description` (String) Description for the device role.
- `slug` (String) URL-friendly unique shorthand for the device role. If omitted, auto-generated from name.
- `vm_role` (Boolean) Whether this role is used for virtual machines.

### Read-Only

- `id` (Number) The numeric ID of the device role.
